reason: Successfully verified agent QA-20260427-053400-w6f2 responds correctly to the query "What is 2+2?" with the answer "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents including QA-20260427-053400-w6f2 with "idle" status.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260427-053400-w6f2" in sidebar — Agent detail page opened, displaying agent configuration panels and message input interface.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator displayed "idle" in the agent detail header, satisfying the requirement of status being "running" or "idle".
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully typed into the input field (ref=e128) and sent via the Send button (ref=e232).
Waited for agent response — Agent responded immediately in 1 second with the message "4", well within the 3-minute timeout requirement.

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" on the right and agent response "4" displayed centrally with "Worked for 1s" annotation, confirming the correct mathematical answer.
